Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99

--- fusefs-mhddfs-0.1.30.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-mhddfs/Makefile  
/usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-mhddfs_30/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-mhddfs/Makefile  2009-10-10  
16:53:44.000000000 +0400
+++ /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-mhddfs_30/Makefile       2010-01-12  
20:33:52.000000000 +0300
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=      mhddfs
-PORTVERSION=   0.1.23
+PORTVERSION=   0.1.30
  CATEGORIES=    sysutils
  MASTER_SITES=  http://mhddfs.uvw.ru/downloads/
  PKGNAMEPREFIX= fusefs-
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@
  RUN_DEPENDS=    
${LOCALBASE}/modules/fuse.ko:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/fusefs-kmod

  USE_GMAKE=     yes
+MAKE_ARGS=     WITHOUT_XATTR=1
  WRKSRC=                ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}

  MAN1=          ${PORTNAME}.1

04bd420ca94211fd01d745f639fe67b6095cc043ee7281726d7456d5ea23ed71

-+++ src/main.c 2009-06-25 05:23:57.000000000 +0400

-
--#if _POSIX_SYNCHRONIZED_IO + 0 > 0
